name: Avocado Veggie Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except bread crumbs together in a blender or food processor and blend until smooth.
2. Put the mixture into a bowl and add bread crumbs until the mixture sticks together enough to be formed into patties.
3. Make two burger-shaped patties and fry in oil until they are browned.
4. Serve on buns with your favorite burger fixings!
